CONTENT.Professional career: Born in Lima, Peru, Prado emigrated to France at the age of 4, and joined the youth academy of FC Nantes at the age of 6. He made his professional debut with in an 8–0 Coupe de la Ligue win over Paris FC on 30 October 2019.

SUMMARY: Percy Prado Ruiz (born 14 January 1996) is a Peruvian professional footballer who plays as a right-back.
